name: Tomato Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut tomatoes into quarters and place in a saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil over heat.
3. Remove from heat and strain through a food mill or blend well in an electric blender.
4. Add sugar and salt.
5. Return mixture to the saucepan and simmer until thickened.
6. Serve over dried peas or beans.
